title: Co-Tenant Roommate Agreement
description: A housemate contract detailing sharing rules for rent, utilities, cleaning schedules, guests, and security deposit return divisions.
whatsCovered: Allocation of monthly rent and utility splits (electricity, internet)
Security deposit contribution divisions and return rules
Household chore schedules and cleaning guidelines
Guest policy limits (overnight stays and quiet hours)
Resolution procedures and moving-out notice timelines
whenToUse: Use this agreement when you are moving into a shared apartment or house with roommates to define financial and social boundaries.

fields.label: Shared Property Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 789 Ocean Blvd, Apt 5A, Miami, FL 33139

clauses.heading: ROOMMATE AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This Roommate Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {roommate_a} and {roommate_b} (collectively, the "Roommates") sharing the residential property located at {premises_address} (the "Premises").

clauses.heading: 1. Rent Allocation & Splits
clauses.body: The total monthly rent for the Premises is {total_rent}. The Roommates agree to split the rent as follows: Roommate A shall pay a monthly portion of the rent, and Roommate B shall pay a monthly portion of {rent_split}. Payments must be submitted to the Landlord by the 1st of each month.

clauses.heading: 2. Utility and Bills Splits
clauses.body: Roommates agree to split all shared utility expenses (electricity, gas, high-speed internet, water) equally (50/50). One roommate shall pay the bills directly and submit requests for reimbursement to the other, which must be paid within 5 business days.

clauses.heading: 3. Cleaning and Maintenance
clauses.body: The Roommates agree to keep the shared common areas (kitchen, living room, bathrooms) clean and tidy. A weekly rotating chore schedule shall be established to distribute cleaning tasks fairly.

clauses.heading: 4. Overnight Guest Policies
clauses.body: Overnight guests are permitted on the Premises, provided that no single guest stays for more than three consecutive nights, or more than six nights total in a calendar month, without the prior consent of the other Roommate.

clauses.heading: 5. Dispute Resolution & Governing Law
clauses.body: The Roommates agree to settle all disputes in a friendly manner. This Agreement shall be interpreted in accordance with the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Does this contract bind the landlord?
faq.answer: No. This roommate agreement is an agreement between the roommates themselves. The lease you signed with the landlord is the only contract binding the landlord.

faq.question: What happens if a roommate moves out early?
faq.answer: Under the lease, you are typically 'jointly and severally' liable to the landlord for the full rent. However, this roommate agreement allows you to legally recover the early-departing roommate's rent share in court.
